NOTE: Do NOT manually edit this file. This file is automatically updated when semantic release (release.yml) runs. Manually editing this file can break your releases and break third party tools that use this file.

patches.name: Enable phone support
patches.description: Runs Samsung Daily Board on phones and treats wireless charging, or charging in landscape, as docking.

patches.name: Force notification grouping
patches.description: Forces Instagram notifications into one group, or into separate groups by notification category.

options.title: Grouping mode
options.description: Choose whether every Instagram notification uses one notification group or separate groups by category.

options.title: Debug logging
options.description: Print notification grouping decisions to logcat.

options.title: Strict all-notifications grouping
options.description: When grouping all notifications together, remove sort keys and conversation hints that can make Android or One UI split Instagram notifications anyway.
